svg.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, 'SF Mono', Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
svg.title: .fable/project.md — the overlay that writes itself
svg.desc: A before-and-after of this repository's .fable/project.md overlay, the two columns labeled session 1 and session 10. Session 1: the acceptance-oracle section is empty and the skill offers to bootstrap it by asking what the acceptance oracle is here; the gotchas log has nothing in it; new work is scoped from zero. Session 10: the oracle row reads gate logic, bash hooks/test-gate.sh, pass prints "all checks pass" (91); the gotchas log carries "a fixture can be green fiction" and "BSD sed has no case-insensitive flag", each with the rule it minted; new work is scoped on top of what is already known. One pointer line is surfaced at every SessionStart; the full file is read only when the method triggers.
svg.text: CONFIRMED FACTS ONLY — IT DOES NOT HOARD GUESSES
new work is scoped from zero
a fixture can be green fiction
→ verify a transcript shape against reality first
BSD sed has no case-insensitive flag
new work is scoped on top of what is already known
SURFACED AT EVERY SESSIONSTART — THE FULL FILE IS READ ONLY WHEN THE METHOD TRIGGERS
<!-- pointer: fable-method — oracle: bash hooks/test-gate.sh -> "all checks pass" (91). Full: .fable/project.md -->
